members.name: SyncProcessor
members.comment: Manages synchronization state with fixed buffers; owned by the module; ensures consistent access across calls.

members.name: init
members.signature: fn init(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, project_root: []const u8, output_dir: []const u8, dry_run: bool, debug: bool) -> SyncProcessor

members.name: processFile
members.signature: fn processFile(self: *SyncProcessor, filepath: []const u8, timeout_seconds: u64) -> types.SyncResult

members.name: processDirectory
members.signature: fn processDirectory(self: *SyncProcessor, dir_path: []const u8, timeout_seconds: u64) -> usize

members.name: relPath
members.signature: fn relPath(abs: []const u8, root: []const u8) -> []const u8

members.name: buildModuleCommentFallback
members.signature: fn buildModuleCommentFallback(self: *SyncProcessor, rel_path: []const u8, members: []const types.Member) -> ?[]const u8
members.comment: Build auto-generated module comment: "module_name: N structs, M functions (name1, name2, ...)"

members.name: hasGofPatterns
members.comment: Returns true when any member (or nested member) has at least one GoF pattern.

members.name: buildSkills
members.signature: fn buildSkills(self: *SyncProcessor, existing_doc: ?types.GuidanceDoc, has_gof: bool, has_domain: bool) -> []const types.Skill

members.name: buildCommentWithSkills
members.signature: fn buildCommentWithSkills(self: *SyncProcessor, comment: ?[]const u8, skills: []const types.Skill) -> ?[]const u8
members.comment:
Prepend a `[skill1, skill2] ` prefix to the module comment using the
deterministically-computed skills slice.  Any existing `[...]` prefix is
stripped first so re-run s remain idempotent.

Returns null when there's no actual comment content (skill tags alone
are NOT a valid comment - they should only annotate real descriptions).

members.name: mergeTags
members.signature: fn mergeTags(self: *SyncProcessor, existing: []const []const u8, new_tags: []const []const u8) -> []const []const u8
members.comment:
Merge new tags from the LLM into the existing tag slice, deduplicating.
Returns a newly allocated slice owned by the caller.

members.name: infillOneFile
members.comment:
Core infill logic for a single guidance JSON file (absolute path).
Loads the JSON, fills blank member/module comments via the Enhancer, and
writes the file back if anything changed.  Returns true when the file was
updated, false when it was unchanged or the enhancer is unavailable.

Called automatically during processFile when LLM is available.

members.name: infillJsonFile
members.comment:
Infill a single guidance JSON file by absolute path.  Suitable for
Makefile per-file dependency targets (`make sync --file src/foo.zig`).
Returns true when the file was updated.

No-op (returns false) when the enhancer is absent or unreachable.

members.name: infillAllJson
members.signature: fn infillAllJson(self: *SyncProcessor, guidance_dir: []const u8, skip_paths: *const std.StringHashMapUnmanaged(void)) -> usize
members.comment:
Walk guidance_dir for all *.json files (excluding those in `skip_paths`)
and fill blank comment fields via the configured Enhancer.
Returns the count of files that were changed.

No-op (returns 0) when the enhancer is absent or unreachable.

members.name: findReverseDeps
members.comment:
Scan src/ directory for Zig files that @import the given module.
rel_path is the relative path of the file being processed (e.g. "src/foo.zig").
